description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single build stage that defines two jobs, rust-latest and rust-nightly. The rust-latest job uses the rust:latest Docker image and runs the commands cargo build --verbose then cargo test --verbose. The rust-nightly job uses the rustlang/rust:nightly Docker image, runs the same cargo build --verbose and cargo test --verbose commands, and is marked allow_failure so its failure does not stop the pipeline. No caches, artifacts, services, or special rules are configured.
